title: dianthus caryophyllus f. charmelii
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus f. charmelii, also known as the Charmel carnation, is a variety of the Dianthus caryophyllus species, which is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antifungal qualities, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting against bacteria and fungi, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Dianthus caryophyllus f. charmelii is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and support overall well-being.
